back_translation: But understand this: in the last days there will be times of difficulty
For people will be lovers of self, lovers of money, boastful, arrogant, slanderous, disobedient to parents, ungrateful, irreverent toward what is holy
Without natural family-affection, refusing to make peace, slanderous, lacking self-control, savage, hating what is good
Treacherous, rash, conceited, lovers of pleasure rather than lovers of God
They have a form of devotion to God, but deny the power of that devotion. Turn away from such people
For among these people are those who sneak into houses and take captive vulnerable women who carry a load of many sins, those who are led by various lusts
Who learn continually, but are never able to come to a knowledge of the truth
Just as Jannes and Jambres opposed Moses, these people likewise oppose the truth — people who are corrupted in mind, and not approved in the matter of faith
But they will not advance further than this, because their foolishness will become plain to everyone, just as it happened with Jannes and Jambres
But you have closely followed my teaching, as well as my conduct of life, my purpose, my faith, my patience, my love, and my perseverance

Persecutions, sufferings, such as happened to me at the city of Antioch, at the city of Iconium, and at the city of Lystra; I endured all those persecutions, and the Lord rescued me from every persecution
Indeed, all who desire to live with devotion to God in Jesus Christ will be persecuted
But evil people and deceivers will progress to greater wickedness, deceiving others and being deceived themselves
But as for you, continue in what you have learned and firmly believed, knowing from whom you have learned
And from when you were an infant, you have known the holy Scriptures, which are able to make you wise leading to salvation through faith in Jesus Christ
All Scripture is the breath-of-the-mouth of God, and is useful for teaching, for rebuking, for correcting, and for training in the matter of righteousness
So that the person of God may be one who is complete, prepared for every good work
